acquisition method: The mass spectrometer was operated in data-dependent acquisition mode.
alkylation reagent: alkylation was performed by addition of 4 µL 1 M IAA solution
alkylation concentration: addition of 4 µL 1 M IAA solution
cleavage agent: For trypsin digestion, 2 µL of trypsin gold solution was added
enrichment method: the eluate was loaded onto an antibody affinity column
fractionation method: a partially purified fraction of ZK002 was extracted from crude D. acutus venom via stepwise separation using an anion-exchange column and cation-exchange column.
instrument: with an Orbitrap Fusion Mass Spectrometer
reduction reagent: addition of 25 µL 200 mM DTT solution
reduction concentration: addition of 25 µL 200 mM DTT solution
